name: Obsidian Vault
description: Read/write/search notes within a configured Obsidian vault directory.

vaultRoot.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault root directory.

denyDotObsidian.description: When true, disallow reading/writing/searching in the .obsidian/ settings folder.

maxReadBytes.description: Maximum bytes to read from a single note.

maxWriteBytes.description: Maximum bytes allowed in a single write.

maxSearchBytesPerFile.description: Maximum bytes scanned per file during search.
